name: bariaccess-lite-devpack
description: BariAccess Lite — Sleep / Stress / Activity / R&R_Lite scoring engine. For Zakiy Manigo, May 9, 2026.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@bariaccess-lite/shared && npm run build --workspace=@bariaccess-lite/backend
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace=@bariaccess-lite/shared && npm run test --workspace=@bariaccess-lite/backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=@bariaccess-lite/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=@bariaccess-lite/backend
